'''Roridan Temquill''' was the [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|CEO]] of [[Biscuit Baron]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he devised the restaurant chain's month-long "[[Heroes of the Republic (campaign)|Heroes of the Republic]]" promotion in the interests of educating young customers about the history of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] using an array of informative [[Holocube/Legends|Holocubes]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|business/13328_2.html|Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"}} {{1st}}
